title: pelargonium × hoariflorum
intro: Pelargonium × hoariflorum, also known as John Crow Beads or Barberton daisy, is a perennial plant species in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of coughs and sore throats. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × hoariflorum include tea infusions, extracts, and essential oils, which are often used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
